notes: Records approved canonical storage paths and deterministic storage contracts ONLY. Creates no data/market-intelligence/ directory, no canonical record, no binding. Path approval does NOT authorize file creation.

properties: not consumed by runtime until a separately approved integration
canonicalRoot.authorities: CBW_EXCHANGE_MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_BRAIN_v1.md §2/§20 (data/market-intelligence/ tree) + CBW_MI_GEO_RECONCILIATION_STANDARD_v1.md §2 (MI cell canonical; one binding per pair)

rules: single canonical cell path
no duplicate canonical copy under cells/by-exchange/**
any future by-exchange view is a generated index/lookup artifact, never competing truth
records contains the 43 normalized source records
every records[] item independently validates against market-source.schema.json
records sorted deterministically by sourceId
no duplicate sourceIds
envelope is a repository storage wrapper, NOT a replacement for market-source.schema.json
confidence/limitations must not be forced into source records when prohibited by the source schema (they live in provenance)
preserve all 77 claim-source links
sort deterministically by linkId
every claimId and sourceId resolves
canonical relationship layer between claims and sources
does not influence production directly
do NOT place supportedClaimIds back into market-source records

provenance.rule: No provenance may be silently discarded.

rules: preserve exactly cf-kz-bybit-001 and cf-kz-bybit-002
both remain PARTIALLY_RESOLVED
sort deterministically by conflictId
preserve routingMatrix
preserve reviewed sources
preserve unresolved evidence
preserve ownerReviewRequired
do NOT auto-resolve conflicts during import
NOT a restriction-event file unless an individual record actually conforms to restriction-event.schema.json
do NOT force normalized conflict records into the restriction-event schema

binding.rule: Writing this non-active binding later does NOT authorize activation.

prohibitions: no duplicate canonical record in another orientation
no version suffix in the canonical filename
history is preserved via Git + provenance, not bybit-v2.json

atomicCanonicalPackage.rule: The future execute task must create ALL six valid files or NONE. No partial canonical package.

rules: no automatic synchronization is permitted yet
no canonical value may silently overwrite legacy GEO
discrepancies require explicit migration reports and owner decisions

canonicalVsProductionSeparation.note: The path decision does not authorize file creation.

recommendationScope: Canonical storage architecture approved (root + six by-country paths + envelopes + atomic-package + normalization + no-duplicate-truth). Records architecture ONLY; creates nothing under data/market-intelligence/. Canonical import execution, binding write/activation, production change, ranking/CTA/promo, and MIGRATION_5 remain BLOCKED and owner-gated.
nextTask: CBW-KZ-BYBIT-P0A-CANONICAL-IMPORT-EXECUTE-006 — owner-gated deterministic write of the atomic six-file canonical package into data/market-intelligence/ per these approved paths/contracts (all-or-none; each file schema-valid; binding non-active). Ranking/CTA/promo activation and MIGRATION_5 remain separate later owner-gated tasks.
